summary: Verified public preview URL fix (port 3001 -> 3000). Public URL loads HTTP 200 with full Tailwind styling, login works end-to-end, dashboard renders correctly for admin user. Both bug fixes (PostCSS/Tailwind + port routing) confirmed working.
passed: React app loads and redirects unauthenticated users to /login
Tailwind CSS fully applied (styled Sign In button: bg=rgb(37,99,235), padding=8px 16px, borderRadius=6px)
Login page renders with styled form (email, password, Sign In button, demo credentials card)
Admin login (admin@ispbilling.local / password) succeeds and redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard renders with sidebar navigation, welcome message, metric cards - all styled correctly
No console errors during full flow
No error alerts on any page
